没有结果的叫代价","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw1NlfyX/AoDbAWY1J7eq5U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7093d6a08f154ac2830d9a7d6816635f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534073&x-signature=T%2Fe63VSoEJvZyd%2FR%2B%2B7sfpPSXGs%3D","user_id":"844060792987800","user_name":"囚星河坠落了."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"844060792987800","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1724389262,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7473698609767140377","book_info":{"abstract":"【多红颜】【不是少年热血争霸】【偏稳健】
穿越玄幻武道世界，方浩成为一方宗门的杂役。
这里万族林立，妖魔纵横。
强者翻手移山填海，剑斩天门。
大妖咆哮，吼落星辰。
凡人卑如蝼蚁，苟且一生。
方浩出身寒微，天赋不显。
好在他绑定系统，可以查看他人的人生，提前掠夺机缘。
【叮，宿主截胡赤炎火晶，可以卖出三万元石。】
【叮，宿主截胡天级功法《斗战伏魔功》，金刚不坏，万邪不侵。】
【叮，宿主截胡气运之女，红颜倾心，气运加身。】
【叮，宿主截胡帝兵剑胚，可培育出无上帝兵。】
……
……
靠着截胡机缘，方浩从凡体蜕变出武道圣体。
从淬体杂鱼，成长为至高神境。
直至登临寰宇之巅，俯瞰万古。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/377ee3cbe82fa19bd248f114816d4e8a","author":"疯狂世界","author_id":"","book_id":"7473698609767140377","book_name":"玄幻：查看人生剧本，我掠夺机缘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8343人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7473698614670262809","read_count":"8343","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"337269"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"136","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o41c1149e10c1be57be44f9b64f011082~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175884&x-signature=ooZVjWuUcKXXEnNxcxhMO7cx3aw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3724780711719992","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201531239A2FA581C1EE46EFBB57"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du duration":34439,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":68922,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3602},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7495507759100494654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看到的第三本超级好看的反派文，基本没有装逼打脸的剧情，有些天命之子的老爷爷说的话也很有大能的风范，不是无脑力挺天命之子，那些小反派也很有脑子，不会一个劲的报仇，当意识到别人比他强时不会揪着不放，主角也很好，对于那些性格善良的天命之子也会给一些帮助，可能有些人说为什么给帮助，那是因为某些天命之子性格好，没有那么多妒忌，也不会什么都想占为己有，反倒是虚心请教，也听得进老爷爷的话。还有就是主角金手指到账后不会忘记父母，宗门大比也是简单拿了第九名的养心丹给父母用，将父母带上武道，并且接父母到身边保护。总的来说写得非常好，至少在番茄来讲"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745196367,"group_id":"7473698609767140377","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzyztU17GfAk0aZQkbah7+o=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"289875534809452","user_name":"大阪地区的冥苍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"289875534809452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7473698609767140377","book_info":{"abstract":"【多红颜】【不是少年热血争霸】【偏稳健】
